Class VaccineTypeCatalogServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
shelter.service.impl.VaccineTypeCatalogServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
VaccineTypeCatalogService
public class VaccineTypeCatalogServiceImpl extends Object implements VaccineTypeCatalogService
Default implementation of VaccineTypeCatalogService backed by a VaccineTypeRepository. Delegates all persistence operations to the repository and enforces catalog-level business rules such as duplicate name prevention on add and update.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • VaccineTypeCatalogServiceImpl

      public VaccineTypeCatalogServiceImpl(VaccineTypeRepository vaccineTypeRepository)
      Constructs a VaccineTypeCatalogServiceImpl with the given repository. The repository is used for all read and write operations on vaccine type records.
      Parameters:
      vaccineTypeRepository - the repository to delegate persistence to; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if vaccineTypeRepository is null

  • Method Details

    • add

      public void add(VaccineType vaccineType)
      Adds a new vaccine type to the catalog. Throws an exception if a vaccine type with the same name already exists. Throws IllegalArgumentException if a vaccine type with the same name already exists.
      Specified by:
      add in interface VaccineTypeCatalogService
      Parameters:
      vaccineType - the vaccine type to add

    • update

      public void update(VaccineType vaccineType)
      Updates an existing vaccine type in the catalog. The vaccine type is identified by its ID; all mutable fields are replaced with those of the given object. Throws an exception if the vaccine type is not found. Throws EntityNotFoundException if the vaccine type is not found. Throws IllegalArgumentException if the new name conflicts with an existing entry.
      Specified by:
      update in interface VaccineTypeCatalogService
      Parameters:
      vaccineType - the vaccine type with updated information

    • remove

      public void remove(String id)
      Removes a vaccine type from the catalog by ID. Throws an exception if no vaccine type with that ID is found. Throws EntityNotFoundException if no vaccine type with the given ID exists.
      Specified by:
      remove in interface VaccineTypeCatalogService
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the vaccine type to remove

    • findById

      public VaccineType findById(String id)
      Returns the vaccine type with the given ID. Throws an exception if no matching vaccine type is found. Throws EntityNotFoundException if no vaccine type with the given ID exists.
      Specified by:
      findById in interface VaccineTypeCatalogService
      Parameters:
      id - the ID to look up
      Returns:
      the matching vaccine type

    • findByName

      public VaccineType findByName(String name)
      Returns the vaccine type with the given name. Throws an exception if no matching vaccine type is found. Throws EntityNotFoundException if no vaccine type with the given name exists.
      Specified by:
      findByName in interface VaccineTypeCatalogService
      Parameters:
      name - the name to look up
      Returns:
      the matching vaccine type

    • listAll

      public List<VaccineType> listAll()
      Returns all vaccine types currently in the catalog. Returns an empty list if the catalog is empty.
      Specified by:
      listAll in interface VaccineTypeCatalogService
      Returns:
      a list of all vaccine types
